channel.title: Discipleship on the KING's Scribe, 7
channel.description: Recent content in Discipleship on the KING's Scribe, 7

item.title: Building the City
item.description:
There’s a kind of statement in the canon, that we have to understand. So profound, indeed, that its ramifications are beyond words. Behold, 👇🏾

Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus, …
… But we have the mind of Christ
that you put off, concerning your former conduct, the old man which grows corrupt according to the deceitful lusts, and be renewed in the spirit of your mind.
